Container.Name: scenehound
Container.Overview: Torznab matching proxy between Whisparr and Prowlarr. Identifies badly-named scene releases on private trackers using Whisparr's own metadata and returns them with canonical titles Whisparr can parse. Add Scenehound's per-tracker endpoints to Whisparr as Torznab indexers; searches and RSS flow through unchanged otherwise.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Holds config.yaml and the generated API key

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that owns /config and runs the service (Unraid default 99 = nobody)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that owns /config and runs the service (Unraid default 100 = users)

Config.Name: Whisparr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Whisparr v3 instance

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your Prowlarr instance

Config.Name: Match Threshold
Config.Description: Minimum confidence (0-100) to return a match. Raise if you ever see a wrong grab.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: info or debug (debug logs per-candidate scoring)

Config.Name: Web UI Enabled
Config.Description: Read-only web UI at /ui showing recent searches, match reasons, and grab/import outcomes

Config.Name: Rate Limit Refill Seconds
Config.Description: Seconds per token refill (higher = gentler on trackers)

Config.Name: Date Skew Forgiveness Days
Config.Description: Max days a release's stamped date may differ from the scene's date and still match when other evidence is strong. Set to 1 to disable forgiveness (old strict behaviour).
